text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm searching for a seat during lunch one day
when I see Mejiro Ryan with her head tilted down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, what should I do... This might be too
much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was planning on resting my muscles today, but I
ended up taking the same amount of food as I
usually do on a workout day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Carbs are an essential source of energy, so I make
sure to eat lots of 'em on workout days...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But on rest days like today, eating this much will
have the opposite effect!
choice_data_list: You should eat what you put on your plate.
You should eat what you put on your plate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But on rest days like today, eating this much will
have the opposite effect!
choice_data_list: You should eat what you put on your plate.
You should eat what you put on your plate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, would you do that for me? That'd be such
a help!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, but you've got your own food!
choice_data_list: No worries, I can handle a little more!
No worries, I can handle a little more!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
For real?! But an unbalanced diet gives you
unbalanced muscles!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I know! How 'bout you do a workout after lunch? I'll spot you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After eating a lot, but not too much, I head for a
workout with Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, y-you’re right... It'd be super wasteful to
throw away food.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay... I put it on my plate, so now I gotta put it
in my belly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is happy to eat her fill and then
some... but she ends up regretting it the next day.
